FIFA World Cup 2026 Will Go Ahead Despite Global Turmoil

Mar 10, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

FIFA World Cup 2026 Will Go Ahead Despite Global Turmoil

FIFA officials have confirmed that the 2026 World Cup will proceed as planned despite ongoing geopolitical tensions, emphasizing that the global tournament is simply too large and complex to postpone.
